title: Upon Doll. Epig.
content:
Doll, she so soon began the wanton trade,
    She ne'er remembers that she was a maid.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Doll. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
